summary: Completed full handshake and CONFIG JSON enhancement. DuckBrowserConfig.cs DTO expanded with Navigator, TLS, WebGL2, WebRtc, Dns, Speech, UI sub-configs and Security sub-configs matching duckbrowser_project_plan.md PHẦN 3 schema. DuckSystemConfig DTO added Languages, TimezoneOffset, Touch, CpuBrand fields. DuckBrowserManager.cs rebuilt BuildFullBrowserConfig() method to populate ALL fields from ProfileDataConfig including TLS cipher lists (per OS), WebGL2 context attributes, full Navigator spoofing, WebRTC policy, Security config chain. CONNECT message flow updated: full DuckBrowserConfig now sent nested inside CONNECT payload (per plan spec) rather than as separate CONFIG message — C++ duck_pipe_server.cc updated to extract and forward the nested config to Mojo. DuckBrowserConfigBuilder.cs retained as standalone builder for future reuse.
current_status: DuckBrowser handshake sends complete fingerprint config in CONNECT message. DTO models match full PHẦN 3 schema including TLS cipher suites, WebGL2 attrs, Navigator spoofing, Security chains. C++ pipe server merges handshake-level profile info with nested config. UserAgent generation uses platform-based default UA string when ProfileData has no explicit UA. TLS cipher lists per OS (Windows/macOS/Linux/Android/iOS) are included. No build errors. Linter clean.
